data.content:
### GET /v2/bookings - Get all bookings

Source: https://github.com/calcom/cal.com/blob/main/docs/api-reference/v2/v1-v2-differences.mdx

Retrieves a list of bookings with various filtering and pagination options. This functionality was not directly available as a dedicated endpoint in v1.

```APIDOC
## GET /v2/bookings

### Description
Retrieves a list of bookings. Supports filtering by status, attendee email, event type, date range, and pagination.

### Method
GET

### Endpoint
`/v2/bookings`

### Parameters
#### Query Parameters
- **status** (string) - Optional - Filter by booking status (e.g., `accepted`, `pending`, `cancelled`, `rejected`).
- **attendeeEmail** (string) - Optional - Filter by attendee's email address.
- **eventTypeId** (integer) - Optional - Filter by the event type ID.
- **afterStart** (string) - Optional - Filter bookings starting after this date/time (ISO 8601 format).
- **beforeEnd** (string) - Optional - Filter bookings ending before this date/time (ISO 8601 format).
- **take** (integer) - Optional - Number of items to return per page.
- **skip** (integer) - Optional - Number of items to skip for pagination.
- **sortStart** (string) - Optional - Sort by start time (`asc` or `desc`).
- **sortEnd** (string) - Optional - Sort by end time (`asc` or `desc`).
- **sortCreated** (string) - Optional - Sort by creation time (`asc` or `desc`).

### Response
#### Success Response (200)
- **status** (string) - Indicates the status of the operation (e.g., `success`).
- **data** (array) - An array of booking objects.
- **pagination** (object) - Contains pagination details.
  - **totalItems** (integer) - The total number of items matching the query.
  - **currentPage** (integer) - The current page number.
  - **totalPages** (integer) - The total number of available pages.
  - **hasNextPage** (boolean) - Indicates if there is a next page.

#### Response Example
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "data": [
    {
      "id": 123,
      "uid": "booking_uid_123",
      "start": "2024-08-13T15:30:00Z",
      "end": "2024-08-13T16:30:00Z",
      "duration": 60,
      "status": "accepted",
      "hosts": [],
      "attendees": [],
      "eventType": {
        "id": 1,
        "slug": "some-event"
      }
    }
  ],
  "pagination": {
    "totalItems": 123,
    "currentPage": 2,
    "totalPages": 13,
    "hasNextPage": true
  }
}
```
```

--------------------------------

### List User Bookings

Source: https://github.com/calcom/cal.com/blob/main/packages/app-store/zapier/README.md

Retrieves a list of user bookings.

```APIDOC
## GET /api/integrations/zapier/listBookings

### Description
Retrieves a list of user bookings.

### Method
GET

### Endpoint
/api/integrations/zapier/listBookings

### Parameters
#### Query Parameters
- **apiKey** (string) - Required - API key for authentication.

### Request Example
```
GET /api/integrations/zapier/listBookings?apiKey=YOUR_API_KEY
```

### Response
#### Success Response (200)
- **bookings** (array) - A list of booking objects.

#### Response Example
```json
{
  "bookings": [
    {
      "id": "booking_id_1",
      "startTime": "2023-10-27T10:00:00Z",
      "endTime": "2023-10-27T11:00:00Z",
      "attendeeName": "John Doe"
    }
  ]
}
```
```

--------------------------------

### List Bookings API

Source: https://context7.com/calcom/cal.com/llms.txt

This endpoint retrieves a list of all bookings for the authenticated user, with support for filtering and pagination.

```APIDOC
## GET /v2/bookings

### Description
Retrieves all bookings for the authenticated user with filtering and pagination.

### Method
GET

### Endpoint
/v2/bookings

### Parameters
#### Query Parameters
- **cal-api-version** (string) - Required - The API version to use (e.g., "2024-08-13").
- **status** (string) - Optional - Filter bookings by status (e.g., "upcoming", "past").
- **limit** (integer) - Optional - The maximum number of bookings to return (default is usually 10).
- **cursor** (string) - Optional - A cursor for paginating through results.
- **afterStart** (string) - Optional - Filter bookings that start after this ISO 8601 timestamp.
- **beforeEnd** (string) - Optional - Filter bookings that end before this ISO 8601 timestamp.
- **eventTypeIds** (string) - Optional - Filter bookings by a comma-separated list of event type IDs.

### Request Example
```bash
# List bookings with filters
curl -X GET "https://api.cal.com/v2/bookings?status=upcoming&limit=20&cursor=100" \
  -H "cal-api-version: 2024-08-13" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer cal_live_***"

# Filter by date range and event type
curl -X GET "https://api.cal.com/v2/bookings?afterStart=2024-01-01T00:00:00Z&beforeEnd=2024-01-31T23:59:59Z&eventTypeIds=123,456" \
  -H "cal-api-version: 2024-08-13" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer cal_live_***"
```

### Response
#### Success Response (200)
- **status** (string) - The status of the operation (e.g., "success").
- **data** (array) - An array of booking objects.
  - **id** (integer) - The unique ID of the booking.
  - **uid** (string) - The unique identifier of the booking.
  - **title** (string) - The title of the event.
  - **status** (string) - The status of the booking (e.g., "accepted").
  - **start** (string) - The start time of the booking.
  - **end** (string) - The end time of the booking.
- **pagination** (object) - Pagination details.
  - **nextCursor** (integer) - The cursor for the next page.
  - **prevCursor** (integer) - The cursor for the previous page.

#### Response Example
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "data": [
    {
      "id": 456,
      "uid": "bk_abc123xyz",
      "title": "30 Min Meeting",
      "status": "accepted",
      "start": "2024-01-15T10:00:00.000Z",
      "end": "2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z"
    },
    {
      "id": 457,
      "uid": "bk_def456uvw",
      "title": "Team Sync",
      "status": "accepted",
      "start": "2024-01-16T14:00:00.000Z",
      "end": "2024-01-16T15:00:00.000Z"
    }
  ],
  "pagination": {
    "nextCursor": 120,
    "prevCursor": 80
  }
}
```
```

--------------------------------

### List Bookings API Endpoint (Cal.com)

Source: https://context7.com/calcom/cal.com/llms.txt

This endpoint retrieves a list of all bookings for the authenticated user. It supports filtering by status, date range, and event type IDs, as well as pagination using cursors. The response includes an array of booking objects and pagination metadata.

```bash
curl -X GET "https://api.cal.com/v2/bookings?status=upcoming&limit=20&cursor=100" \
  -H "cal-api-version: 2024-08-13" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer cal_live_***"
```

```bash
curl -X GET "https://api.cal.com/v2/bookings?afterStart=2024-01-01T00:00:00Z&beforeEnd=2024-01-31T23:59:59Z&eventTypeIds=123,456" \
  -H "cal-api-version: 2024-08-13" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer cal_live_***"
```

--------------------------------

### Get Booking API

Source: https://context7.com/calcom/cal.com/llms.txt

This endpoint retrieves details for a specific booking using its unique identifier (UID). It can fetch single bookings or all recurrences of a recurring booking.

```APIDOC
## GET /v2/bookings/{uid}

### Description
Retrieves booking details by UID, including normal, recurring, or seated bookings.

### Method
GET

### Endpoint
/v2/bookings/{uid}

### Parameters
#### Path Parameters
- **uid** (string) - Required - The unique identifier of the booking (e.g., "bk_abc123xyz" for a single booking or "rec_xyz789abc" for recurring bookings).

#### Query Parameters
- **cal-api-version** (string) - Required - The API version to use (e.g., "2024-08-13").

### Request Example
```bash
# Get a single booking
curl -X GET https://api.cal.com/v2/bookings/bk_abc123xyz \
  -H "cal-api-version: 2024-08-13" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer cal_live_***"

# Get all recurrences of a recurring booking
curl -X GET https://api.cal.com/v2/bookings/rec_xyz789abc \
  -H "cal-api-version: 2024-08-13"
```

### Response
#### Success Response (200)
- **status** (string) - The status of the operation (e.g., "success").
- **data** (object or array) - The booking details. This will be an object for a single booking or an array of objects for recurring booking instances.
  - **id** (integer) - The unique ID of the booking.
  - **uid** (string) - The unique identifier of the booking.
  - **title** (string) - The title of the event.
  - **hosts** (array) - An array of host objects.
    - **id** (integer) - Host's ID.
    - **name** (string) - Host's name.
    - **email** (string) - Host's email.
  - **status** (string) - The status of the booking (e.g., "accepted").
  - **start** (string) - The start time of the booking.
  - **end** (string) - The end time of the booking.
  - **attendees** (array) - An array of attendee objects.
    - **name** (string) - Attendee's name.
    - **email** (string) - Attendee's email.
  - **meetingUrl** (string) - The URL for the meeting.

#### Response Example
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "data": {
    "id": 456,
    "uid": "bk_abc123xyz",
    "title": "30 Min Meeting",
    "hosts": [
      {
        "id": 1,
        "name": "Alice Smith",
        "email": "alice@example.com"
      }
    ],
    "status": "accepted",
    "start": "2024-01-15T10:00:00.000Z",
    "end": "2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z",
    "attendees": [
      {
        "name": "John Doe",
        "email": "john@example.com"
      }
    ],
    "meetingUrl": "https://zoom.us/j/123456789"
  }
}
```
```

--------------------------------

### Get Booking Calendar Links (API)

Source: https://context7.com/calcom/cal.com/llms.txt

Retrieves 'Add to Calendar' links for a booking, compatible with major calendar services like Google Calendar, Microsoft Office, and Outlook. It also provides an ICS link. The API requires the booking UID and authentication. The response contains URLs to add the booking event to a user's calendar.

```bash
# Get calendar links for a booking
curl -X GET https://api.cal.com/v2/bookings/bk_abc123xyz/calendar-links \
  -H "cal-api-version: 2024-08-13" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer cal_live_***"
```
